title: Haage-Tools
description:
This pack adds custom items dependent on the name of the tool/item.

All items in this pack are either made by myself or items with free-use permissions.

You can use this pack to see my tools when I use them or use them yourself.
body:
--- ## 🌟 General Info This pack adds **custom item textures** based on the item's **custom name**. Use it to personalize your tools, food, and utility items with unique looks. All textures are either original or used with free-use permission. > 💬 If you play on the same server as me, I might add something just for you, just ask ;) --- ## 🛠️ How to Use Rename items using **specific keywords or icons** to trigger custom textures. > ✅ Capitalization **matters** > ✅ Icons must be exact > ✅ Rename in anvils --- ## 🧾 List of Items
🔧 Custom Tools Rename **Diamond** and **Netherite** tools with the following names to apply special textures: > **⛏ Pickaxe** > `⛏ Fortune ⛏`, `Fortune` > `⛏ Silk Touch ⛏`, `Silk Touch` > **🪓 Axe** > `🪓 Fortune 🪓`, `Fortune` > `🪓 Silk Touch 🪓`, `Silk Touch` > **🥄 Shovel** > `🥄 Fortune 🥄`, `Fortune` > `🥄 Silk Touch 🥄`, `Silk Touch` > **🪛 Hoe** > `🪛 Fortune 🪛`, `Fortune` > `🪛 Silk Touch 🪛`, `Silk Touch` > **🗡️ Sword** > *(Netherite only)* > `Blue` > `just to make haage mad ( ◡̀_◡́)ᕤ`, `just to make haage mad`, `Haage mad` > *(Diamond only)* > `dia sword` > **🔭 Spyglass** > `Kikkert`, `binoculars` > `3d`, `spy` ![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82b9a29016849469d32deeb834b4d342f1511c2c.png)
🍽️ Custom Food > **🍎 Apple** > `🍎`, `Red Apple`, `red apple`, `red` > `🍏`, `Green Apple`, `green apple`, `green` > **🍉 Melon Slice** > `🍉`, `slice` > **🍲 Mushroom Stew** > `🍲`, `stew` > `🍄`, `shroom` > **🥧 Pumpkin Pie** > `🥧`, `pie` > **🍰 Cake** > `🍰`, `shortcake`, `cake slice`, `slice` > **🍪 Cookie** > `🍪`, `cookies` > **🍞 Bread** > `🍞`, `🥖`, `toast`, `baguette` > **🍖 Cooked Beef** > `🍖`, `Big Meat`, `big meat` ![Food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5132def952c221248e1b4cd49ea93281722304ad.png)
📚 Other Items > **📕 Book** > `📕`, `stack_1`, `1`, `bookie`, `big book` > `📗`, `stack_2`, `2` > `📘`, `stack_3`, `3` > **🥤 Glass Bottle** > `🥤`, `glass`, `cup` > `💧`, `water`, `water_glass`, `glass of water` > **🥚 Egg** > `🥚`, `3d` > **🥚 Brown Egg** > `🥚`, `3d` > **🥚 Blue Egg** > `🥚`, `3d` > **🪣 Bucket** > `🪣`, `3d` > **🪣 Milk Bucket** > `🪣`, `3d` > **🪣 Water Bucket** > `🪣`, `3d` > **🍼 Experience Bottle** > `🍼`, `xp` > **🐉 Dragon’s Breath** > `🐉`, `😤`, `breath` > **🍯 Honey Bottle** > `🍯`, `honey` > **🟢 Slime Ball** > `🟢`, `slimey` > **✒ Ink Sac** > `✒`, `bowl`, `sac`, `ink` > **✒ Glow Ink Sac** > `✒`, `bowl`, `sac`, `ink` ![Other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff7608aca8968d3010f5d17344ba155bef7bf49.png)
--- ## 📸 Previews

Go to gallery to see images in full screen: haage-tools gallery
